title: Amtech - Poly Foam Brushes for Staining Wood with Tapered Heads for Easy Access to Intricate Areas, Home DIY, No Brush Marks, Easy to Clean, Includes Different Sizes (Set of 4)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: EFFICIENT: The Amtech G4482 Poly Foam Brush Set efficiently applies wood stain to surfaces.
VERSATILE SIZES: Includes four sizes (1", 2", 3", and 4") for versatile use on various woodworking projects.
SMOOTH FINISH: Leaves no brush marks, ensuring a smooth and professional finish.
SUITABLE FOR ALL PRODUCTS: Ideal for both water and oil-based wood products, providing versatility.
EASY TO CLEAN: Simply clean after use for hassle-free maintenance.
description: Product Description The brush set includes four sizes (1", 2", 3", and 4") for various woodworking projects, and they’re ideal for wood dyes, oils, and varnish. The brushes efficiently soak up wood stain and apply it evenly without leaving brush marks for a professional finish. They’ve also been designed with tapered heads so that you can access all areas, even the intricate ones. There’s no need for frequent re-loading, and the brushes are easy to clean after use for simple maintenance.
